description: Controls sector strength, breadth, and rotation variables.

sector_relative_strength_score.name: Sector Relative Strength Score
sector_relative_strength_score.description: Scores stock sector performance relative to the broad market.

missingPolicy.fallbackLogic: use neutral value when no reliable proxy exists; use documented proxy when available
missingPolicy.actionRestriction: if missing data materially affects this variable, block BUY_NOW and prefer WAIT_CONFIRMATION or HUMAN_REVIEW

realTimeHandling.realtimeValuePolicy: estimated values must be flagged and later reconciled with confirmed close data
realTimeHandling.staleDataPolicy: apply ConfidenceScore penalty and restrict aggressive ActionCodes

regimeAdjustment.strongUptrend: relax ordinary overheat penalties and reward continuation if risk gates are clear
regimeAdjustment.sideways: prioritize range boundaries, false breakout risk, and confirmation
regimeAdjustment.strongDowntrend: increase risk penalties and require stronger confirmation
regimeAdjustment.highVolatility: increase slippage, spread, and false signal penalties

stockTypeAdjustment.largeCap: increase flow and macro relevance; reduce orderbook fragility weight
stockTypeAdjustment.smallCap: increase liquidity, spread, and fake liquidity penalties
stockTypeAdjustment.theme: increase narrative, volume, and crowding sensitivity; reduce pure financial weight
stockTypeAdjustment.lowLiquidity: prioritize liquidity risk and execution gates
stockTypeAdjustment.ipoOrEventStock: require wider thresholds and higher sample-size caution

thresholdOptimization.selectionRule: choose highest ThresholdQualityScore with acceptable MDD, enough signal frequency, and stable regime performance

sector_breadth_score.name: Sector Breadth Score
sector_breadth_score.description: Scores how many stocks inside the sector participate in the move.

stockTypeAdjustment.ipoOrEventStock: require wider thresholds and higher sample-size caution

sector_rotation_score.name: Sector Rotation Score
sector_rotation_score.description: Scores whether capital is rotating into the sector from weaker themes.
